textByHash.2800e0f340df5642307947f5252cdff4695b1744: You'll see sire. Switch the machine on!
textByHash.d63b6c50d68d65c51559f9d758fec738c9282320: The Silver Spirit Tree is dead!
textByHash.93dfe797013c058aaa84c4453aa5df82ba43de00: Glouphrie has been using his foul arts to mask the truth! What other secrets has he been keeping?
